chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-116 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 19-05-2025 Mr. Aneet Kumar, Advocate along with petitioners. M/s Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G and Muhammad Raza Katohar, APG a/w SIP Dhani Bux on behalf of SSP, Sukkur, SIP Aijaz Ahmed, SHO, P.S, Patni, SIP Gulzar Ahmed on behalf of SSP, Khairpur and ASI Hassan Ali of P.S, Kandhra. **** Learned AAG files statements of respondents No.2,3,4 and SSP, Khairpur, taken on record and copies whereof are supplied to counsel for the petitioners. In their statements, they categorically submit that no FIR has been registered against the petitioners and they will act strictly in accordance with law. After such statements, counsel for petitioners being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with directions to official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provide protection to the petitioners, as and when required. JUDGE Ahmad
